<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Subscribers; use Pest\Support\Container; use PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner\Configured; use PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner\ConfiguredSubscriber; use PHPUnit\TextUI\Configuration\Configuration; /** * @internal */ final class EnsureConfigurationIsAvailable implements ConfiguredSubscriber { /** * Runs the subscriber. */ public function notify(Configured $event): void { Container::getInstance()->add(Configuration::class, $event->configuration()); } }
